scripts.db:schema: node -e "require('dotenv/config'); const {Pool} = require('pg'); const fs = require('fs'); const p = new Pool({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL}); p.query(fs.readFileSync('src/db/schema.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('✅ Schema applied');p.end()}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);p.end()});"
